0.description: Junwatch Stone Ward of Rain Oath of Elhelm is a doctrine of mountain warding under Elport the Gale Keeper teaching that sacred boundaries must be guarded before glory is sought. Its honored virtue is vigilance, and its taboo is abandoning a warded place. The religious mandate behind it says religion must cleanse broken orders and break corrupt oaths openly.

1.description: Ilton Thunder Cleansing of Rain Oath of Elhelm is a doctrine of storm renewal under Harton the Thunder Lord teaching that upheaval can cleanse a failing order. Its honored virtue is renewal, and its taboo is clinging to a broken oath. The religious mandate behind it says religion must cleanse broken orders and break corrupt oaths openly.

2.description: Fenia Deep Boundary of Rain Oath of Elhelm is a doctrine of mountain warding under Quaovar the Rain Mother teaching that sacred boundaries must be guarded before glory is sought. Its honored virtue is vigilance, and its taboo is abandoning a warded place. The religious mandate behind it says religion must cleanse broken orders and break corrupt oaths openly.

3.description: Elara Forge Standard of Counting Creed of Galdrim is a doctrine of craft perfection under Galstead the Market Keeper teaching that a realm is judged by the honesty of its craft. Its honored virtue is mastery, and its taboo is passing flawed work as finished. The religious mandate behind it says religion must witness fair exchange and weigh bargains in public.

4.description: Ulmere Open Hand of Counting Creed of Galdrim is a doctrine of fair exchange under Marara the Scale Mother teaching that peace rests on measured trade and witnessed bargains. Its honored virtue is fair dealing, and its taboo is cheating under a trusted seal. The religious mandate behind it says religion must witness fair exchange and protect guest merchants.

5.description: Armere Current Rite of Counting Creed of Galdrim is a doctrine of river pilgrimage under Corvale the Coin Witness teaching that roads and rivers bind distant halls into one people. Its honored virtue is hospitality, and its taboo is turning away a lawful traveler. The religious mandate behind it says religion must witness fair exchange and weigh bargains in public.

6.description: Pelvale Perfect Work of Counting Creed of Kelwatch is a doctrine of craft perfection under Ordrim the Coin Witness teaching that a realm is judged by the honesty of its craft. Its honored virtue is mastery, and its taboo is passing flawed work as finished. The religious mandate behind it says religion must witness fair exchange and punish false ledgers.

7.description: Pelora True Measure of Counting Creed of Kelwatch is a doctrine of craft perfection under Lorara the Scale Mother teaching that a realm is judged by the honesty of its craft. Its honored virtue is mastery, and its taboo is passing flawed work as finished. The religious mandate behind it says religion must witness fair exchange and protect guest merchants.

8.description: Ilvale Pilgrim Road of Counting Creed of Kelwatch is a doctrine of river pilgrimage under Rivport the Road Father teaching that roads and rivers bind distant halls into one people. Its honored virtue is hospitality, and its taboo is turning away a lawful traveler. The religious mandate behind it says religion must witness fair exchange and weigh bargains in public.

9.description: Ilton Master's Rule of Peak Rite of Armere is a doctrine of craft perfection under Ulia the Stone Father teaching that a realm is judged by the honesty of its craft. Its honored virtue is mastery, and its taboo is passing flawed work as finished. The religious mandate behind it says religion must guard sacred bounds and raise cairns for the lost.

10.description: Beldun Remembrance of Peak Rite of Armere is a doctrine of ancestor duty under Nordrim the Peak Mother teaching that the dead remain part of every public decision. Its honored virtue is duty, and its taboo is forgetting a sworn lineage debt. The religious mandate behind it says religion must guard sacred bounds and ask leave before deep digging.

11.description: Eladia High Guard of Peak Rite of Armere is a doctrine of mountain warding under Arton the Deep Keeper teaching that sacred boundaries must be guarded before glory is sought. Its honored virtue is vigilance, and its taboo is abandoning a warded place. The religious mandate behind it says religion must guard sacred bounds and guard boundary stones.

12.description: Arora Bridge Charge of Night Path of Coreria is a doctrine of river pilgrimage under Ordrim the Far Seer teaching that roads and rivers bind distant halls into one people. Its honored virtue is hospitality, and its taboo is turning away a lawful traveler. The religious mandate behind it says religion must record signs before action and keep night watches from falsehood.

13.description: Torhelm Duty of Night Path of Coreria is a doctrine of ancestor duty under Ilvale the Night Mother teaching that the dead remain part of every public decision. Its honored virtue is duty, and its taboo is forgetting a sworn lineage debt. The religious mandate behind it says religion must record signs before action and record omens before obeying them.

14.description: Pelton Star Reading of Night Path of Coreria is a doctrine of star study under Quaovar the Lantern Lord teaching that signs must be recorded before they are obeyed. Its honored virtue is wisdom, and its taboo is hiding an omen from the learned. The religious mandate behind it says religion must record signs before action and record omens before obeying them.
